title: Anthropic Is Hiring Biologists, Building Wet Labs, and Betting Big on Drug Discovery
summary: At SynBioBeta 2026, Anthropic's life sciences lead Eric Kauderer-Abrams and Xaira Therapeutics CEO Marc Tessier-Lavigne discussed the convergence of AI with drug discovery. They outlined Anthropic's strategy to compress R&D timelines ten-fold by training Claude (Opus 4.6) on biological data, operating wet labs, and acquiring Coefficient Bio for biotech operational expertise, while acknowledging that causal understanding of biology remains an early-stage challenge.
